assertions.title: build.rs compiles render library in rlib chain

steps.action: grep build.rs for render rlib compilation
steps.expected: rustc_rlib call for render library found with extern dependencies
steps.observed: build.rs:122-128 compiles libraries/render/lib.rs as librender.rlib via rustc_rlib_with_search with externs: drawing, scene, protocol, fonts
build.rs:159-160: compositor binary receives externs.push(("render", render_rlib.clone()))

evidence.grepOutput: build.rs:123: let render_rlib = out_dir.join("librender.rlib"); build.rs:125: rustc_rlib_with_search(..., &render_rlib, "render", ...); build.rs:160: externs.push(("render", render_rlib.clone()))

summary: Tested 10 assertions: 10 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. RenderBackend trait exists at lib.rs:54 with correct signature. CpuBackend implements it at lib.rs:237. Render library compiles as standalone rlib with no sys/ipc dependencies. All 6 rendering files removed from compositor (only main.rs and frame_scheduler.rs remain). All 1764 tests pass with 0 failures. Test crate imports from render:: library. Compositor constructs CpuBackend and calls backend.render(). build.rs correctly compiles render rlib and links it to compositor. Kernel binary builds successfully.
